text:
Team USA takes on Brazil in the quarterfinal of the men’s Olympic basketball tournament at the Bercy Arena in Paris.

Save

Share

This blog is now closed, thanks for joining us. These were the updates on the 2024 Paris Olympics men’s basketball quarterfinal between USA and Brazil in Paris on Tuesday, August 6.
